data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Added config generation subsection (Step 2b) to Phase 3 of SKILL.md. Content includes: ticket prefix derivation (my-app → MA), CI workflow examples with ci-generator.sh, ACLI_VERSION auto-suggestion via acli-version-resolver.sh, and all 9 dso-config.conf key categories (format, ci, commands, jira, design, tickets, merge, version, test). Updated Quick Reference table to mention config generation.
